arts.ttl: Aston Villa follow Man City plan to combat unique Champions League problem
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola stated that it is "common sense" that grass is better for football in his pre-match press conference ahead of facing Young Boys, while City, like Villa, also chose to train at the Wankdorf Stadium instead of at their training campus in Manchester before the game. Aston Villa will train at the Wankdorf Stadium today to get used to the artificial surface they'll play on against Young Boys on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Jacob Ramsey makes Aston Villa pledge after Jhon Duran's stunning winner vs Everton
arts.sum: Jacob Ramsey's replacement Jhon Duran gave Aston Villa victory over Everton, but Ramsey has made a pledge of his own after a first home start since back in February

arts.ttl: What has changed about Jhon Duran after Aston Villa transfer uncertainty
arts.sum: Jacob Ramsey has praised Jhon Duran's shift in mentality, saying the striker returned to Aston Villa last month "a different player". I think this season as you can tell, he’s come back with a different mentality and attitude.

arts.ttl: European giants eye SHOCK move for Amadou Onana
arts.sum: The Spanish giants are also interested in signing PSV Eindhoven’s Jerdy Schouten and Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich as they look to bolster the midfield options available to Hansi Flick. Barcelona remain interested in Amadou Onana and could push to sign the Belgium international next year, despite his move to Aston Villa this summer.
